## Case Study

- **Title:** [Name of the case study]
- **Country:** [Country the case study covers]

## Issue Type

- [ ] Factual error
- [ ] Broken or outdated citation
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Outdated data
- [ ] Spelling or grammar
- [ ] Other

## Description

Describe the issue with the case study content.

## Suggested Correction

If you know the correct information, please provide it here along with a source or reference.

## Source / Reference

Link to a credible source that supports the correction.
